citations.narrative:
The acquisition and disposition records available for review were not current or complete. The acquisition of animals
obtained (a zebra, a pig, three ducks) and those disposed of (an eland, a nilgai, a camel, cows, sheep, goats) are either
missing all or part of the following: dates of acquisition or disposition, names and addresses of whom the animals were
acquired from, USDA license number and/or Driver’s license number. Other animals (goats, cows, and sheep) were born
on property but not documented. Without records which fully disclose the animal’s acquisition as well as disposition
information, legal and medical information traceback is not possible. The facility shall ensure that it makes, keeps, and
maintains records which fully and correctly disclose the following information concerning all exhibition animals: name,
address, and USDA number, if applicable, of the person from whom the animal was acquired from or given to, the date of
the acquisition or disposition, the species and quantity of animals involved. The records shall include any offspring born of
any animal while in his or her possession or under his or her control.
Correct by: 03/01/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
n

Records: Dealers and exhibitors.
